g.text: 5. AI AGENT LAYER · Multi-Agent (Orchestrator + Six Specialists)
Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 — Trace Retention
No write to production code paths

svg.text: Pattern: orchestrator-specialist + fan-out/fan-in · Defense-in-depth with self-funding economic discipline · Read-only on production · Draft-PR for all changes
Component count: 28 (excluding cross-cutting controls) · Soft-limit ceiling 30 per Tier 1 design rule · Specialists grouped to prevent agent-layer sprawl
